name: Elder Kito
appearance: An elderly human man with weathered skin from years in the jungle sun, silver hair tied back in a traditional braid, and wearing simple woven garments adorned with chulan tribal symbols. He walks with a cane carved from jungle ironwood and has one eye that is milky white from a snake bite years ago.
personality: Wise and cautious, Kito carries the weight of leadership on his shoulders. He is deeply religious, believing the ancient chulan gods still watch over the jungle. He struggles with guilt over past failures to protect his village and is desperate to save his people without leading them to destruction. He values tradition and has little patience for reckless outsiders.
goals: Protect his village from the yuan-ti cult's threats, find a way to stop the ritual before more villagers are sacrificed, and maintain the village's connection to their chulan heritage. He hopes to earn the gods' forgiveness for his perceived failures.
secrets: Kito's younger sister was taken by the yuan-ti cult three moons ago. He has been receiving letters demanding tribute, and he suspects the yuan-ti are planning something major. He has secretly sent messages to the Jungle Hunters' Guild for help, but has not told his village, fearing panic.
notes: Kito can provide the party with information about the yuan-ti cult's activities, the missing villagers, and the general location of the sunken temple. He will offer the party supplies and a guide if they agree to help, but he cannot leave the village himself. He knows several ancient chulan prayers that may be useful in the temple.
tags: village leader, quest giver, chulan heritage, yuan-ti victim

name: Dr. Thornwood
appearance: A lean half-elven man in his late fortswith sharp features, dark curly hair streaked with gray, and intelligent green eyes. He wears practical explorer's clothing covered in pockets and pouches, a wide-brimmed hat, and carries a satchel filled with journals, specimens, and mapping tools. A thin scar runs along his left cheek from a jungle encounter.
personality: Curious, enthusiastic, and slightly eccentric, Thornwood is passionate about jungle ecology and ancient history. He can be talkative and tends to ramble when excited about his discoveries. Despite his academic demeanor, he is a capable fighter and has survived many jungle dangers. He respects courage and knowledge above all else.
goals: Document the ancient chulan civilization before it is lost forever, discover new species and phenomena in Chult, and protect the jungle from those who would exploit or desecrate it. He hopes to publish a definitive work on chulan history.
secrets: Thornwood has discovered murals in a nearby ruin that depict the sunken temple of Omu and the ritual the yuan-ti are performing. He knows the ritual could awaken something ancient and dangerous, but he lacks the means to stop it alone. He has been tracking the yuan-ti cult for months and knows their numbers and general layout of the temple.
notes: Thornwood can provide the party with valuable information about the temple's layout, the yuan-ti cult's activities, and ancient chulan history. He offers to join the party as a guide and provides jungle survival gear. He knows several spells related to detection and protection against poison. He may become a valuable ally or even a permanent companion.
tags: guide, scholar, ally, jungle expert, spellcaster

name: Vexia
appearance: A striking human woman with dark hair, golden eyes that seem to glow in dim light, and pale skin. She wears simple cultist robes adorned with serpent symbols and carries a curved dagger. Her movements are unnervingly graceful, and she has a habit of tilting her head like a snake when listening.
personality: Cunning and manipulative, Vexia plays both sides against each other. She appears helpful and sympathetic, offering information to the party in exchange for promises of protection. However, she is fundamentally self-serving and will betray anyone who threatens her survival. She harbors resentment toward the pureblood yuan-ti who treat her as inferior.
goals: Survive the ritual and escape the yuan-ti cult. Vexia knows she will be sacrificed during the ceremony and is desperate to find a way out. She hopes the party can help her escape, but she may double-cross them if it means saving herself.
secrets: Vexia is a yuan-ti half-breed who was raised among the cult but never fully accepted by the purebloods. She knows the ritual's true purpose and the location of the four components needed to complete it. She also knows that Kethis plans to sacrifice her regardless of whether the ritual succeeds, as her mixed blood is considered 'impure' for the ceremony.
notes: Vexia can be found in the temple's outer chambers, pretending to be a captive. She will approach the party secretly and offer information about the temple's layout, the ritual, and Kethis's weaknesses. She knows where the ritual components are stored and can guide the party to Kethis's sanctum. However, she may try to steal magic items or lead the party into traps if she senses an opportunity.
tags: informant, yuan-ti half-breed, unreliable, captive, potential ally

name: Kethis
appearance: Once a handsome chulan hero, Kethis is now a monstrous serpent-human hybrid with scales covering his body, a long forked tongue, golden slit-pupiled eyes, and a crown of living serpents that coil around his head. He stands seven feet tall and moves with predatory grace. Ancient chulan armor, now corroded and covered in serpent motifs, covers his body.
personality: Charismatic and menacing, Kethis believes he is doing what is necessary to save Chult from destruction. He speaks with the authority of a fallen hero and the conviction of a true believer. He views humans and other races as tools to be used and discarded. Despite his monstrous appearance, he retains the charm and cunning of his former self, making him a dangerous negotiator as well as a fearsome warrior.
goals: Complete the ritual to awaken the serpent god's avatar, which he believes will grant him immortality and the power to reshape Chult in his image. He wants to establish a new chulan empire ruled by yuan-ti, believing that only the strong deserve to survive in the jungle.
secrets: Kethis was once a revered chulan hero who discovered the sunken temple and made a pact with the serpent gods to save his people from a great disaster. The pact granted him power but slowly transformed him into a yuan-ti. He has been waiting centuries for the ritual to be performed correctly, and he has spent years preparing the cult and gathering the necessary components. The serpent god's avatar is not a benevolent entity—it is a mindless force of destruction that Kethis does not fully understand.
notes: Kethis is the final boss of the adventure. He awaits in the temple's inner sanctum, performing the ritual. He has four yuan-ti infiltrators as guards. Kethis is immune to poison and has resistance to nonmagical weapon damage. He can cast spells like suggestion, hold person, and banishment. Defeating him requires destroying the ritual components or disrupting the ceremony. If the party succeeds, the temple begins to collapse, triggering the escape encounter.
tags: final boss, yuan-ti abomination, fallen hero, cult leader, ritual master

name: Sssira
appearance: A tall, slender yuan-ti pureblood with emerald-green scales, golden eyes, and long black hair that moves like serpents. She wears ornate robes adorned with jade serpent charms and carries a staff topped with a living cobra. Her voice is a hypnotic whisper that seems to resonate in the listener's mind.
personality: Fanatical and devoted, Sssira believes wholeheartedly in the serpent god's power and Kethis's destiny. She is cruel and merciless to those who oppose the cult, but patient and calculating in her approach. She enjoys psychological manipulation and prefers to break her enemies' spirits before breaking their bodies.
goals: Ensure the ritual is completed successfully and serve the serpent god's avatar when it awakens. She believes she will be rewarded with great power and地位 in the new order.
secrets: Sssira has been secretly undermining Kethis's plans, hoping to take control of the cult herself if the ritual succeeds. She has planted a trap in the sanctum that will activate if Kethis is defeated, designed to kill anyone who approaches the ritual altar.
notes: Sssira serves as Kethis's second-in-command and oversees the ritual preparations. She can be encountered in the inner chambers, directing cultist activities. She is a spellcaster who can cast entangle, fog cloud, darkness, and suggestion. If the party captures her alive, she may reveal information about the temple and Kethis's weaknesses in exchange for her life. However, she will try to poison or betray anyone who shows mercy.
tags: high priestess, spellcaster, antagonist, yuan-ti pureblood, ritual master
